steps.intent: Draft the bylaw amendment with an embedded indemnification clause that directly addresses Raul's liability concern, using the existing workspace_sublease_bylaw_text as a base.
steps.exact_content:
Proposed Amendment to Harborview Co-op Bylaws, Article VII: Workspace Sublease

Section 7.4 – Indemnification for Board Members
Notwithstanding any other provision of these bylaws, the Cooperative shall indemnify and hold harmless each board member, including Raul Mendes, against any and all claims, losses, damages, or liabilities arising out of or related to the approval, execution, or administration of any workspace sublease agreement, provided that the board member acted in good faith and in the reasonable belief that their actions were in the best interests of the Cooperative. This indemnification shall extend to legal fees and costs incurred in defending against such claims. This provision shall be effective immediately upon adoption and shall apply retroactively to any sublease agreements entered into prior to this amendment.

MINUTES OF SPECIAL BOARD MEETING – October 10, 2025

Agenda: Address Raul Mendes' liability concern regarding the proposed workspace sublease bylaw amendment.

Attendees: June Okafor, Petra Lindqvist, Raul Mendes

Discussion: Raul Mendes expressed concern that the bylaw amendment could expose board members to personal liability for sublease defaults. The board discussed three options: (a) modify bylaw text to include an indemnification clause, (b) obtain external legal opinion, (c) add a written board commitment to indemnify.

Decision: The board unanimously agreed to modify the bylaw text to add the following clause: 'The board shall indemnify and hold harmless each board member from any liability arising from the workspace sublease arrangement.'

Next Steps: The modified bylaw text will be presented at the regular October board meeting for formal adoption.
